3294620.name: Last Sighting
3294620.description: With night falling and odd lights flashing off in the distance hours ago. Awaken to the sound of your neighbors farm dog barking outside. Lead Jeffery the dog home using your trusty lantern to light the way, Just make sure to keep track of your fuel. Deal with slight puzzles along this Sci-fi horror adventure and learn what has happened to your neighbor. With something hiding in the dark and your car broken down. You must find a way to protect yourself and Jeffery and get away from the area. Before its to late.
3294620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
